name: locality-attending-vit
description: Apply Locality-Attending Vision Transformer to locality-attending problems. Technique: Vision transformers have demonstrated remarkable success in classification by le...
content:
## Overview

This skill implements the technique from "Locality-Attending Vision Transformer".

Key contribution: Vision transformers have demonstrated remarkable success in classification by leveraging global self-attention to capture long-range dependencies. However, this same mechanism can obscure fine-grained spatial details crucial for tasks such as segmentation.

## When to use

- Apply when solving locality-attending problems
- When baseline approaches are insufficient
- Working with structured problem spaces

## When NOT to use

- If problem constraints limit complexity
- When simpler methods achieve target performance
- Time-critical scenarios with strict latency needs

## Core Technique

The paper proposes an approach through:

1. Problem formulation from the paper
2. Algorithm implementation as described
3. Integration with existing systems
4. Evaluation against baselines

## Implementation

1. Understand problem requirements
2. Implement core algorithm components
3. Configure evaluation metrics from paper
4. Compare against baseline methods
5. Tune hyperparameters for your domain

## References

Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.04892
